dialogueChunks.intro: A prospector found something valuable {location_hint}: a deposit of {quest_item} richer than anything we've seen in this region. Word is already spreading.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The problem is that we're not the only ones who know. The {enemy_type} have been pushing into that area, and {quest_ally} spotted organized groups heading the same direction. If we don't claim {quest_focus} first, someone else will.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone fast and capable to get out there and secure what we need before it's all gone. {player_name}, will you make the trip?

playerResponses.text: What's my cut if I bring it back?

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc}'s home was broken into last night. They took only one thing: a family heirloom that's been passed down for generations. It's irreplaceable.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The thieves weren't ordinary burglars. They knew exactly what they wanted and where it was kept. {quest_ally} found tracks leading {location_hint}, and the boot prints match the {enemy_type} we've seen lurking near the borders.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} means everything to {target_npc}. Will you track down {quest_threat} and bring it back, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: I'll bring it home where it belongs.
Thieves deserve what's coming to them.
It's just an object. Let it go.

dialogueChunks.intro: A sickness has swept through the settlement. {quest_ally} says the cure requires {quest_item} that only grows in the wilds {location_hint}, and our stores are empty.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Three people are already bedridden, and more show symptoms each day. The herbs we need for {quest_focus} won't survive being shipped from afar: they have to be gathered fresh. The problem is that the gathering grounds are deep in {enemy_type} territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without those ingredients, {quest_stakes} are in mortal danger. {player_name}, will you venture out and bring back what we need?

playerResponses.text: Lives are at stake. I'll go now.
Tell me exactly what to look for.
The wilds are too dangerous right now.
